name: @ai-ds/synaptik
description: Synaptik AI Icon Builder — CLI and pipeline for raster icon sets (companion to @ai-ds/core, not bundled in core npm tarball).

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/icon-set-styles/icon-set-styles.test.ts src/pipeline/build-prompt.test.ts src/pipeline/build-prompt-style.test.ts src/pipeline/concepts.test.ts src/pipeline/prompt-audit.test.ts src/pipeline/icon-style-bible.test.ts src/pipeline/catalog-reconcile.test.ts src/pipeline/publish-ready.test.ts src/pipeline/prune-safe.test.ts src/pipeline/publish-repair.test.ts src/adapters/icon-composition.test.ts src/adapters/icon-qa.test.ts src/adapters/playwright-capture.test.ts src/workspace-root.test.ts src/utils/catalog-status.test.ts src/utils/merge-content.test.ts src/utils/page-url.test.ts src/utils/render-dir.test.ts src/utils/ensure-unique-content.test.ts src/utils/render-versions.test.ts src/session/delete-session.test.ts src/synaptik-config.test.ts
